title: Phytip Protein A, ProPlus, ProPlus LX Columns - Neutralization
author: Opentrons

steps.title: Since the elution buffer supplied along...
steps.instruction: Since the elution buffer supplied along with PhyTip® Protein A, ProPlus or ProPlus LX Columns is highly acidic (pH 2.5), this protocol (Neutralization) is developed to transfer the neutralization buffer (pH 9.0) to the final product of protein purification (elution plate) to adjust the pH.

steps.title: Transfer neutralization buffer (slot 10) to...
steps.instruction: Transfer neutralization buffer (slot 10) to each well containing the eluate (slot 11)
